THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTS, LEON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 54 4TH STREET, ROOM 302 $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, STAYED UNTIL OCT-03-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59PM. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
